summary: ProductOS can now distribute market-intelligence output through a governed internal leadership digest while keeping freshness, contradiction, and approval boundaries explicit.
key_decisions: Adopt the internal leadership digest as the first broader distribution path for the refreshed market-intelligence slice.
Reuse the same unattended-refresh guardrails and review boundaries before any broader publication surface is allowed.
major_risks: External publication adapters are still not directly proven for this slice.
Broader distribution packaging beyond the leadership digest remains future work.
